🎵

Music lives in Home Assistant

Playback, queueing, and media controls are handled by Music Assistant inside Home Assistant. Zoe talks to that stack over the existing HA bridge, so there's no separate music surface in the desktop UI.

Ask in chat (e.g. “play some focus music in the office”) or use your Home Assistant dashboard for full control.

🏠 Open Home Assistant
